metadata.schema_notes: price and cogs in USD; margin expressed as decimal (0.85 = 85%); cogs is imputed at $25/hour opportunity cost for solo operator — digital products have zero marginal cost per unit after development; margin calculated after ~15% Etsy fees (6.5% transaction + 3%+$0.25 payment + $0.20/listing amortized)
metadata.regional_listings_note: 14 regional variant listings (7 Native Plants, 7 Survival Garden) use existing Phase 1 PDFs with no new content and are the highest-ROI Phase 3 action per development hour. See regional_listings section below. They are excluded from the 12-product main spec because they require no content creation.

products.name: Beginner Canning Quick-Start Guide
products.phase_1_trigger: Harvest Preservation Field Manual in Phase 1 top-3 converting products, OR Etsy messages asking 'Is there a beginner version?' or 'I've never canned before'
products.seasonal: Peak July-September (canning season); secondary January-March (planning season)
products.description: 30-35 page entry-level canning reference expanding the canning section of the Phase 1 Harvest Preservation Field Manual. Covers equipment selection (water bath vs. pressure canner), the five best first vegetables to can, headspace and processing time reference table, safety checklist, and common-failure troubleshooting. Positions as the lower-commitment gateway to the full preservation suite for buyers who find the $16 comprehensive manual intimidating.
products.dependencies: Derives from harvest-preservation-field-manual.md. USDA National Center for Home Food Preservation (nchfp.uga.edu) for processing time verification. Phase 1 gate: Harvest Preservation Field Manual must be live before launch.
products.success_metric: $200/month gross by Month 4; 2.5%+ Etsy conversion rate within 30 days of launch

products.name: Fermentation Starter Kit Guide
products.phase_1_trigger: Fermented Harvest Handbook in Phase 1 top-5 converting products by revenue, OR buyer search patterns showing 'fermentation for beginners' traffic to any Phase 1 listing
products.description: 25-35 page lacto-fermentation guide derived from the Phase 1 Fermented Harvest Handbook. Covers salt ratios, jar equipment, and five first ferments: sauerkraut, kimchi, vegetable pickles, fermented hot sauce, brine-preserved vegetables. Targets buyers who want vegetables-only fermentation, not the full vinegar-preservation and live-culture spectrum of the existing handbook.
products.dependencies: Derives from fermented-preserved-harvest-handbook.md. Cross-sells to Grow Your Own Hot Sauce ($15) buyers.
products.success_metric: $175/month gross by Month 4; 2%+ Etsy conversion rate; cross-sell from Hot Sauce Guide buyers appearing in Etsy referral traffic

products.name: Dehydrating and Drying Field Guide
products.phase_1_trigger: Harvest Preservation Field Manual converting at 1%+, OR Etsy search traffic showing 'food dehydrator guide' as a traffic source to any Phase 1 listing
products.seasonal: Peak July-September; secondary year-round for backpackers and off-grid audience
products.description: 35-45 page standalone dehydrating reference expanding the dehydrating section of the Phase 1 Harvest Preservation Field Manual. Covers dehydrator selection, oven drying, air-drying herbs, solar drying setup, time-and-temperature reference table for 40 produce items, rehydration instructions, and shelf-life data. Dehydrating is underserved on Etsy compared to canning. Key audience: backpackers, off-grid homesteaders, food-storage preppers.
products.dependencies: Derives from harvest-preservation-field-manual.md and meat-fish-preservation-field-manual.md. USDA FoodSafety.gov dehydrating temperature guidelines (public domain) for safety reference.
products.success_metric: $220/month gross by Month 4; 2%+ conversion rate; included in Preservation Season Starter Bundle purchase at least 30% of the time

products.name: Pressure Canning Meat and Poultry Guide
products.phase_1_trigger: Hunting/Fishing Manual or Meat/Fish Preservation Field Manual in Phase 1 top-5 by revenue, OR Etsy messages asking 'Does this cover canning venison?' or 'Can I pressure can chicken?'
products.seasonal: Peak August-October (hunting season and late harvest); secondary year-round for livestock raisers
products.description: 40-50 page specialist guide merging the meat-handling sections of the Meat/Fish Preservation Field Manual with the pressure canning methods in the Harvest Preservation Field Manual. Covers pressure canning safety protocols for meat, processing times for chicken/beef/pork/venison/fish, broth and stock canning, and a field-dressing-to-jar workflow for hunters. Most Etsy canning guides avoid meat due to safety complexity — this is the gap. Safety protocols verified against USDA Complete Guide to Home Canning (public domain).
products.dependencies: Derives from meat-fish-preservation-field-manual.md and harvest-preservation-field-manual.md. USDA Complete Guide to Home Canning (Bulletin 539-B, public domain) required for meat processing time verification.
products.success_metric: $280/month gross by Month 5; 2%+ Etsy conversion rate; purchased together with Hunting/Fishing Manual in at least 15% of transactions involving that product

products.name: Wild Edibles Quick Reference — 18 Common North American Wild Edibles
products.phase_1_trigger: Native Plants Regional Guide in Phase 1 top-3 converting products AND forager cohort above 20% in post-purchase survey responses
products.description: 22-25 page visual identification reference using the 18 wild-edibles habit photos completed in Session 560 (all CC BY-SA licensed from Wikimedia Commons). One page per species: habit photo, common name, species name, 3 key identification features, lookalike warning where applicable, harvest season, edible parts, and preparation method. Compact visual companion to the text-heavy Native Plants Regional Guide. Includes photo attribution page (CC BY-SA license requirement).
products.dependencies: 18 wild-edibles habit photos already downloaded and archived (Session 560). Hard requirement: attribution page included before publication. Cross-sells to Native Plants Regional Guide ($18).
products.success_metric: $200/month gross by Month 4; purchased together with Native Plants Regional Guide in at least 20% of Native Plants transactions; 15%+ repurchase rate from forager cohort within 90 days

products.name: Wild Edibles Habitat Photo Pack — 18 Species Digital Download
products.phase_1_trigger: Forager cohort identified as 20%+ of Phase 1 buyers, OR Etsy messages asking about photo rights or whether images can be reprinted — signals educator/creator sub-audience presence
products.description: ZIP package of all 18 wild-edibles habit photos from the Seedwarden assets library, delivered as high-resolution JPEG files. Packaged with ATTRIBUTION.txt (source URL and CC BY-SA license per image) and README.txt explaining reuse terms. Audience: bloggers, homeschool curriculum creators, foraging instructors, nature educators, and content creators who need licensed botanical photography. Must clearly state in listing: buyers may use with attribution under CC BY-SA, not royalty-free commercial use.
products.dependencies: 18 wild-edibles habit photos already downloaded and archived (Session 560). Zero content creation required — only packaging, ATTRIBUTION.txt, and README.txt (3 hours total). Wild Edibles Quick Reference should launch first to establish forager audience.
products.success_metric: $120/month gross by Month 5; 2+ Etsy reviews from educator or homeschool buyers confirming use case; conversion rate above 1.5%

products.name: Native Plants Identification Flashcard Set — 40 Plants, Printable
products.phase_1_trigger: Forager cohort at 20%+ of buyers, OR homeschool/educator buyers identified in post-purchase survey responses
products.seasonal: Year-round (peak September-October for nature study; secondary spring for outdoor education)
products.description: 40-50 printable plant identification cards in 3x5 inch format, derived from the Native Plants Regional Guide. Each card: botanical illustration or photo, common name, species name, 3 identification features, habitat notes, edibility note, and lookalike warning. Delivered as PDF with one-card-per-page layout for index card printing and a 4-up layout for letter paper. Audience: teachers, homeschoolers, nature journalers, foraging course instructors, and trail guides who need a tactile, printable tool.
products.dependencies: Content derives from native-plants-regional-guide.md. Wikimedia Commons botanical photos for card illustrations. Conditional on forager cohort signal: if forager cohort below 15% by Month 2, deprioritize to Month 5.
products.success_metric: $175/month gross by Month 5; identified as top-3 product in 'nature study' or 'homeschool' search terms via Etsy traffic sources

products.name: Seed Library Setup and Organization System — Complete with Printable Templates
products.phase_1_trigger: Seed Saving Field Manual in Phase 1 top-5 by revenue, OR Etsy messages asking 'How do I organize my seeds?' or 'Does the guide include templates?'
products.seasonal: Peak September-November (seed-saving season); secondary January-March (planning season setup)
products.description: 40-50 page seed library organization system including 10 printable templates: seed envelope labels (3 sizes), seed catalog record card, germination tracking log, annual planting-out calendar, variety description card, trade and swap sheet, viability chart by species, storage conditions reference, seed library binder cover, and section divider tabs. Addresses the post-seed-saving organization problem that the Phase 1 Seed Saving Field Manual does not cover. Serves buyers at the 'I saved the seeds but now what?' stage.
products.dependencies: Content derives partly from seed-saving-field-manual.md for viability chart and storage conditions data. Seed Savers Exchange (seedsavers.org) for variety viability benchmarks. Can launch September-November without seasonal conversion impact.
products.success_metric: $280/month gross by Month 6; Seed Saving Field Manual buyers purchasing this product within 30 days at a rate of 10%+ (tracked via UTM-tagged email Day 7 cross-sell)

products.name: Medicinal Herb Growing and Harvest Guide — 20 Herbs from Seed to Storage
products.phase_1_trigger: Forager cohort at 20%+ of Phase 1 buyers AND Native Plants Regional Guide converting at 1.5%+ — both signals required. If either is absent by July 1, move to Phase 4.
products.seasonal: Year-round (peak April-July for growing season start; secondary September for harvest and preservation)
products.description: 50-60 page cultivation and preservation guide for 20 commonly grown medicinal herbs: chamomile, lavender, echinacea, elderberry, lemon balm, holy basil, calendula, yarrow, mullein, valerian, rosemary, peppermint, St. John's wort, feverfew, comfrey, and 5 regionally determined species. Per-herb entries cover growing requirements, container vs. in-ground, harvest timing and technique, drying and processing methods. No medical claims — educational cultivation and preservation guide only. Standard disclaimer included. 20 herb photos sourced from Wikimedia Commons (CC-licensed, attribution page required).
products.dependencies: USDA PLANTS Database for botanical verification. iNaturalist for regional distribution. 20 herb photos from Wikimedia Commons (~2 hours sourcing). This is Phase 3's only product requiring original research (12 hours). Conditional on dual Phase 1 signal.
products.success_metric: $250/month gross by Month 6; 1.5%+ Etsy conversion rate; appears in Etsy search results for 'medicinal herb guide' within 60 days of launch (tracked via eRank)

products.name: Homestead Skills Assessment and Learning Roadmap
products.phase_1_trigger: Homesteader cohort at 30%+ of Phase 1 buyers (expected baseline) AND average order value below $20 — signals buyers are purchasing individual products without a clear cross-sell path. Also triggered by 'homesteading for beginners' search traffic reaching any Phase 1 listing.
products.seasonal: Year-round (peak January-March for new-year planning; secondary October for winter prep planning)
products.description: 30-40 page self-assessment and structured learning pathway for people building homesteading or food-sovereignty skills. Covers: current-skills inventory checklist (100 skills across 8 categories: gardening, seed saving, preservation, foraging, livestock, wild harvest, community, and preparedness), beginner/intermediate/advanced skill tiers, recommended learning sequence, 12-month first-year homesteader learning calendar, and resource recommendations that explicitly cross-reference specific Seedwarden products at each skill tier. Simultaneously a standalone value product and the most effective catalog navigation tool in Phase 3.
products.dependencies: Content synthesized across all 21 Phase 1 product files for the skills taxonomy and cross-reference map. Benefits from at least 8 Phase 3 products being live so cross-references within the guide point to real listings. Sequence after Month 5 launches.
products.success_metric: Average order value increases by $5+ in the 30 days after launch (indicating bundle upgrades are triggered); $200/month gross by Month 7; purchased as second product by 15%+ of new customers within 30 days

products.name: First-Year Food Preservation Planner — Printable Seasonal Planning Journal
products.phase_1_trigger: Gift buyer cohort at 15%+ of Phase 1 buyers AND preservation products generating 25%+ of Phase 1 revenue — confirms both the gift audience and preservation category are delivering sufficient volume to justify a gift-positioned preservation product.
products.seasonal: Peak October-December (holiday gift window); secondary July-August (preservation season start — gift to self)
products.description: 55-60 page printable planner organized around the preservation calendar from July through February. Monthly sections include: harvest readiness tracker, preservation goal-setting, supplies checklist for each method (canning, fermenting, dehydrating, freezing), batch production log (what was preserved, date, quantity, storage location), gift and sharing log, and next-year notes. Designed to be printed and bound — the tactile, journal-like format creates higher gift potential than a reference manual. Positioning: 'Plan your preservation season before the harvest arrives.'
products.dependencies: Original planner design — no Phase 1 content derives directly. Canva layout-intensive: monthly spreads, tracker tables, checklist grids (10 hours). PDF print-test required before listing. Natural post-purchase follow-up email to preservation manual buyers on Day 7.
products.success_metric: $250/month gross by Month 7 (October + November holiday lift); gift buyer cohort purchasing this product at 20%+ of gift bundle purchases during October-December window

products.name: The Homesteader's Complete Reference Set — Expanded 7-Guide Gift Bundle
products.phase_1_trigger: Gift buyer cohort at 15%+ of Phase 1 buyers AND Homesteader's Complete Bundle ($50) appearing in Phase 1 top-5 revenue generators — confirms gift-buyer appetite for premium bundles. Also triggered by significant October traffic spike on any bundle listing.
products.seasonal: Peak October-December (holiday gift season); minimal off-season demand
products.description: Seven-guide expanded gift bundle combining four Phase 1 Homesteader's Complete Bundle products (Small-Scale Livestock Field Manual, Hunting/Fishing Manual, Harvest Preservation Field Manual, Meat/Fish Preservation Field Manual) with three Phase 3 additions (Wild Edibles Quick Reference, Medicinal Herb Guide, Homestead Skills Assessment and Learning Roadmap). Individual total $106; bundle price $62 (saves $44, 41% off). The $44 savings figure and the 7-guide scope are the primary conversion drivers. Positioned as 'the most complete homesteading reference library available on Etsy.' Delivered as ZIP containing all 7 PDFs.
products.dependencies: Hard dependency: all three Phase 3 constituent products must be live before bundle listing goes live (Wild Edibles Quick Reference M3, Medicinal Herb Guide M5, Homestead Skills Assessment M6). Phase 1 dependency: Homesteader's Complete Bundle in top-5 Phase 1 revenue generators. Zero new content required — listing creation only (2 hours).
products.success_metric: $500/month gross during October-December window; average of 1 unit/day during Black Friday week (November 27-30); appears in Etsy search results for 'homesteading gift' within 45 days of launch

regional_listings.overview: 14 regional variant listings use existing Phase 1 PDFs with no new content. They are the highest-ROI Phase 3 action per development hour: approximately 19 hours total to create all 14 listings, each capturing region-specific keyword traffic (e.g., 'Pacific Northwest foraging guide', 'Texas survival garden plan') that the national listing cannot rank for.

native_plants_regional_listings.phase_1_trigger: Native Plants Regional Guide top-3 converting product by Week 4
native_plants_regional_listings.note: Full PDF delivered is the complete multi-region Native Plants guide. Regional title creates region-specific keyword surface. Buyers wanting their specific region pay $12; buyers who want all regions are directed to the $18 complete guide (favorable contrast pricing).

survival_garden_regional_listings.phase_1_trigger: Survival Garden Regional Plans in top-5 Phase 1 products by views; always launch regardless of Phase 1 signal — highest ROI per development hour
survival_garden_regional_listings.note: Pricing at $5.99 creates strong contrast with the complete $22 bundle — buyers who want just their region pay $5.99; buyers wanting all regions pay $22 (implies 63% discount on the complete guide vs. buying all 7 individually at $41.93).

phase3_bundles.name: Preservation Season Starter Bundle
contents: Dehydrating and Drying Field Guide (SW P3)
phase3_bundles.conversion_mechanic: 'Complete beginner's preservation bundle for the 2026 harvest season' — answers 'where do I start?' for new buyers

phase3_bundles.name: Master Preserver Bundle — Complete Home Preservation Library
contents: Dehydrating and Drying Field Guide (SW P3, $11)
phase3_bundles.conversion_mechanic: The $38 savings figure is the headline — reads as the price of a full guide being given away. Primary conversion driver is savings amount, not percentage.

phase3_bundles.name: Regional Forager Bundle
phase3_bundles.conversion_mechanic: Shallow discount — value is convenience and framing, not savings. Consider deepening to $24 (14% off) if conversion below 1% at 30 days.

price_increase_tests.revert_trigger_all: Conversion rate drops more than 25% vs. 30-day July baseline

products.rationale: Regional listings at $12 create favorable contrast: the complete 9-region, 80-plant guide at $22 is clearly the better value. Currently underpriced at $18 relative to content depth.
Individual region listings at $5.99 imply $41.93 total for all 7 regions, making $24 for the complete bundle read as a 43% discount vs. buying all regions separately.
Most specialized, lowest-competition product in Phase 1 catalog. Specialist buyers have higher price tolerance. No adjacent product would be cannibalized by this increase.

revenue_targets.note: Gross revenue before Etsy fees (~15% combined). Phase 1 baseline established May-June 2026.

monthly.label: M6 gift season + full catalog live

success_metrics_summary.kill_threshold: Any Phase 3 product below 1.5% conversion after 60 days AND below $100/month gross revenue: pull from ad spend and promotional rotation before Month 3 of its listing age
